data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of $156.78 million, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflow
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trader T monitoring shows that yesterday, the US Bitcoin spot ETF had a net outflow of US$156.78 million, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflow.

data.title: OKX launches IP trading event, and you can share 200,000 IP prize pool by participating
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX has now launched an IP trading event, which will be held from 20:00 on February 13, 2025 to 7:59 on February 27, 2025 (UTC+8). During the event, users who recharge and trade IP will have the opportunity to share a total IP prize pool of 200,000.
It is reported that Story is creating a world-class IP public chain, which is an L1 that allows anyone to access intellectual property (IP) assets and convert them into programmable intellectual property.

data.title: Yesterday, the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of $12.83 million
data.description: Trader T monitoring data shows that the US Ethereum spot ETF had a net inflow of $12.83 million yesterday. Among them, BlackRock ETHA had a net inflow of $11.96 million, Fidelity FETH had a net inflow of $4.64 million, Grayscale ETHE had a net outflow of $3.77 million, and other ETFs had no net inflow/outflow.

data.title: LBank has launched R6D9 (R6D9) and CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI)
data.description:
LBank launched R6D9 (R6D9) for the first time at 00:10 (SGT) on February 14, and opened the R6D9/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 00:00 on February 15.
LBank launched CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI) for the first time at 01:45 (SGT) on February 14, and opened the BROCCOLI/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 00:00 on February 15.

data.title: Bithumb will list Thena (THE)
data.description: South Korean crypto exchange Bithumb announced that it will launch Thena (THE).

data.title: U.S. States Consider Bitcoin Reserve Legislation
data.description:
According to PANews, Vaneck analyst Matthew Sigel reports that 20 U.S. states are advancing legislation related to Bitcoin reserves. If all proposals are approved, it could lead to an influx of $23 billion into the Bitcoin market, equivalent to approximately 247,000 BTC.

The study examines various state-level investment mechanisms, including reserve funds and pension plans. Some states are proposing to allocate budget surpluses, stabilization funds, and land funds for Bitcoin investments.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 680 USDT with a Narrowed 3.88% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 02:29 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 680 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 681.539978 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.88% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 1.28% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 02:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,700 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,706.52002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.28% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ethereum Surpasses $2700 Mark With 2% Daily Increase
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum (ETH) has recently surpassed the $2700 mark, with the current price reported at $2700.66 per coin. This marks a 2% increase in its value within the day.

data.title: Bank Of Montreal Invests In Bitcoin ETFs
data.description: According to PANews, the Bank of Montreal (BMO), Canada's third-largest bank, has recently acquired approximately $150 million in spot Bitcoin ETFs. Of this investment, around $139 million has been allocated to BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin ETF, while the remaining $11 million is distributed among three other funds.
